name: Beach Day! | The Amazing Digital Circus Episode 7 RPG
description:
DO NOT DO IF YOU DO NOT WANT SPOILERS!

Has every character from episode 7, plus Caine!

I WANT TO FUCKING STRANGLE HIM AFTER WHAT HE PUT MY CHILDREN THROUGH—

But yeah! Have fun!

OML TYSM FOR NEARLY A HUNDRED FOLLOWERS—

I did NOT think I would get this far without y'all!

Characters included:

Pomni

Ragatha

Jax

Gangle

Kinger

Zooble

Caine

Abel

WARNINGS: Possible abstraction. That's...All I can think of.

1st intro doesn't have Abel, the second one weaves him in. Have fun...!

Third intro is open scenario! Was just updated for that!
creator: ♥Varesa♥
